mapper.sql: A.ANSWER_NO AS commentNo, A.NTT_ID AS nttId, A.BBS_ID AS bbsId, A.WRTER_ID AS wrterId, A.WRTER_NM AS wrterNm, A.ANSWER AS commentCn, A.USE_AT AS useAt, A.FRST_REGISTER_ID AS frstRegisterId, TO_CHAR(A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS frstRegisterPnttm, (SELECT M.USER_NM FROM VW_USER_MASTER M WHERE M.ESNTL_ID = A.FRST_REGISTER_ID) AS frstRegisterNm
mapper.select: SELECT FROM TB_COMMENT A WHERE A.NTT_ID = #{nttId} AND A.BBS_ID = #{bbsId} AND A.USE_AT = 'Y' ORDER BY A.ANSWER_NO
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_COMMENT A WHERE A.NTT_ID = #{nttId} AND A.BBS_ID = #{bbsId} AND A.USE_AT = 'Y'
SELECT FROM TB_COMMENT A WHERE A.NTT_ID = #{nttId} AND A.BBS_ID = #{bbsId} AND A.USE_AT = 'Y' ORDER BY A.ANSWER_NO
SELECT FROM TB_COMMENT A WHERE A.ANSWER_NO = #{commentNo} AND A.NTT_ID = #{nttId} AND A.BBS_ID = #{bbsId}
SELECT FROM TB_COMMENT A WHERE A.ANSWER_NO = #{commentNo} AND A.NTT_ID = #{nttId} AND A.BBS_ID = #{bbsId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_COMMENT (ANSWER_NO, NTT_ID, BBS_ID, WRTER_ID, WRTER_NM, ANSWER, PASSWORD, USE_AT, FRST_REGISTER_ID, FRST_REGIST_PNTTM) VALUES (#{commentNo}, #{nttId}, #{bbsId}, #{wrterId}, #{wrterNm}, #{commentCn}, #{commentPassword}, 'Y', #{frstRegisterId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_COMMENT SET USE_AT = 'N', LAST_UPDT_PNTTM = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE ANSWER_NO = #{commentNo} AND NTT_ID = #{nttId} AND BBS_ID = #{bbsId}
UPDATE TB_COMMENT SET ANSWER = #{commentCn}, LAST_UPDT_PNTTM = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE ANSWER_NO = #{commentNo} AND NTT_ID = #{nttId} AND BBS_ID = #{bbsId}
